ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
gsl:
- '2.7'
numpy:
- '2'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.description:
pygsl_lite is a minimal wrapper around GSL based on the pygsl library.
It contains a small feature set aimed at physics modeling. The reduced
feature set, as well as supporting only modern GSL versions makes the
maintenance much simpler for small projects.

name: pygsl_lite

about.description:
pygsl_lite is a minimal wrapper around GSL based on the pygsl library.
It contains a small feature set aimed at physics modeling. The reduced
feature set, as well as supporting only modern GSL versions makes the
maintenance much simpler for small projects.

pygsl_lite is a minimal wrapper around GSL based on the pygsl library.
It contains a small feature set aimed at physics modeling. The reduced
feature set, as well as supporting only modern GSL versions makes the
maintenance much simpler for small projects.

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: pygsl_lite
  version: 0.1.8

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/pygsl_lite-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 3213755c71da61e9629551e088530130d28e27048cd5f3ba48deb8165e6df6de

build:
  number: 1
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv
  skip:
    - win

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler("c") }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - swig >=4.0
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cython
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - numpy
  host:
    - gsl
    - numpy
    - pip
    - python
    - setuptools
    - setuptools-scm >=3.4.3
    - wheel
  run:
    - gsl
    - numpy >=1.23
    - python

tests:
  - files:
      source:
        - test/
    requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - pytest
    script:
      - python -m pip check
      - python -m pip show pygsl_lite
      - python -m pytest test/

about:
  summary: Minimal GNU Scientific Library Interface
  description: |
    pygsl_lite is a minimal wrapper around GSL based on the pygsl library.
    It contains a small feature set aimed at physics modeling. The reduced
    feature set, as well as supporting only modern GSL versions makes the
    maintenance much simpler for small projects.
  homepage: https://github.com/AEI-ACR/pygsl_lite
  license: GPL-2.0-or-later
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - lorenzopompili00
    - raffienficiaud
